overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action-adventure game showing a female warrior walking through a dense, foggy forest with bare trees and rocky terrain. The character navigates over obstacles and through narrow rocky passages before entering a shallow stream in a misty, atmospheric woodland environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy forest trail with scattered rocks and birch trees

events.description: character jumps over a fallen log blocking the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through misty forest navigating around rocks and sparse trees

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock outcrop on the right side of the path
tall white-barked trees with no leaves visible through the fog
small boulders and stones littering the forest floor
horizontal log lying across the path that the character steps over

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open foggy forest with scattered birch trees and mossy rock formations. At around 12 seconds, she jumps over a fallen log blocking the path, continuing deeper into the misty woodland.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense foggy woodland with winding dirt path

agents.ego_description: continuing along winding forest path surrounded by dense bare trees and undergrowth

entered.detail: thick cluster of leafless trees creating a dense canopy overhead
uneven ground with exposed rock faces and roots

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the forest, the path winds through denser woodland with closely packed bare trees. The fog remains thick, limiting visibility as the character progresses along the dirt trail away from the open rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky gorge with moss-covered walls

events.description: passing under a large fallen tree trunk that blocks the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow rocky passage with high mossy stone walls on both sides

entered.detail: tall stone walls covered in green moss forming a narrow corridor on the left
tall stone walls covered in green moss forming a narrow corridor on the right
large horizontal tree trunk suspended across the path at chest height

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a narrow rocky gorge with moss-covered walls. The character approaches and passes under a large fallen tree trunk that blocks the path, continuing through the enclosed misty passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow forest stream with mossy banks

events.description: transition from dry forest trail to shallow water stream

agents.ego_description: stepping into and wading through a shallow stream with water reaching ankle depth

entered.detail: clear shallow water flowing over mossy stones and pebbles
green moss-covered earth at the water's edge on the left
green moss-covered earth at the water's edge on the right

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shallow forest stream, wading through the clear water. The scene transitions from the rocky corridor to a waterway surrounded by mossy banks, with the fog continuing to obscure the distant forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty woodland that transforms from an open forest into a narrow rocky gorge and finally a shallow stream. It begins with the character navigating an open area of scattered birch trees and mossy rock formations, jumping over a fallen log to push deeper into the woods. As the path winds forward, the environment shifts into a denser woodland of closely packed bare trees where the thick fog further limits visibility. The scene then tightens into a narrow rocky gorge with moss-covered walls, leading the character under a large fallen trunk before the enclosed passage opens up. Finally, the terrain transitions into a waterway as the character wades through a clear forest stream surrounded by mossy banks under a persistent shroud of mist.
